etymology.description: иЁЂ(иЁЂ) (yГЎn, "speech") + ж•–(ж•–) (ГЎo) = sound of loud talking
etymology.interpretation: The character и¬· combines иЁЂ(иЁЂ) (yГЎn, "speech"), indicating it relates to speech or talking, with ж•–(ж•–) (ГЎo), which acts as the phonetic component. The combination suggests the sound of loud talking or boasting.
